description:
Legal record (#23) in a court register/pinqas from a beit din in Cairo (on f. 3r-v of T-S K22.27). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated in the first third of Tammuz 5453 AM, which is 1693 CE. 

(Document #23) Complex real estate transaction explaining multiple phases of shifting ownership over shares in a residential qāʿa on Darb al-Naṣūr (presumably in Cairo). A wide variety of names and the qodesh of the Mustaʿrab congregation are mentioned, such as: Avraham al-Eytī (אליתי) aka Skandarī, Avraham Kohen, Marḥaba [surname missing], Klara (Clara) bt. Moshe ha-Levi the widow of Shemuʾel al-Eytī, and the scribe of the document itself Nissim De Aragon. The entry also mentions a hujja in connection with the property that was issued on 18 Shawwāl 1088 AH (1677 CE). MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
